description_long: This is a modern platform bed featuring a wooden frame with a rich, reddish-brown finish and a slightly curved, wide headboard. The bed is topped with a thick, teal-blue mattress and is neatly made with a matching teal-blue sheet. Two large pillows with teal-blue covers and white accents are placed against the headboard, each accompanied by a smaller, square teal-blue cushion in front. The bed sits low to the ground, with a solid base that gives it a sturdy and contemporary appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible footboard. The materials and color palette suggest a comfortable and inviting piece suitable for a stylish urban bedroom.
description: A modern platform bed with a wooden frame, teal-blue mattress, and matching pillows, featuring a wide curved headboard and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wooden headboard, two large teal-blue pillows with white accents, and two smaller teal-blue cushions on a teal-blue mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the layered arrangement of pillows, and the curved profile of the wooden headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width and curvature of the wooden headboard, with the mattress and bedding barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the mattress, pillows, and the headboard's curve from the other side.
